payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded and should not be treated as current.
payload.decision: Recall selected the newer memory for Sam from Goldman and excluded the older one because it was marked superseded, so only the current unsuperseded memory should be treated as active.

entity_resolution.reason: mem_new is the non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman, while mem_old was filtered out as superseded.

payload.intent: Explain why recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman and filtered mem_old because it is superseded.

memory_cards.statement: The active recalled memory for Sam from Goldman is mem_new; mem_old is not current because it has been superseded.

details: Filtered the older memory due to supersession.

repair_options: Keep mem_new as the active memory for Sam from Goldman.
Retain mem_old only as historical context, not as current state.
